question_text: Comparing three devices: Device X (60% efficient), Device Y (75% efficient), and Device Z (82% efficient). All three use 1000 J of input energy. Which device wastes the most energy, and by how much compared to the most efficient device?
correct_answer: Device X wastes the most energy. It wastes 400 J while Device Z wastes only 180 J, a difference of 220 J.
explanation: Device X wastes 40% of 1000 J = 400 J. Device Y wastes 25% of 1000 J = 250 J. Device Z wastes 18% of 1000 J = 180 J. Device X has the highest waste, and comparing it to Device Z: 400 J - 180 J = 220 J difference.
